command.evs.image.create-from-volume.des: Create a private image from an unattached volume.
command.evs.snapshot-policy.associate-vo: Associate volumes with an automatic snapshot policy.
command.evs.snapshot-policy.disassociate: Disassociate volumes from an automatic snapshot policy.
command.evs.snapshot-policy.list.descrip: List automatic snapshot policies or retrieve one policy.
command.evs.snapshot-policy.set-status.d: Enable or disable automatic snapshot policies.
command.evs.snapshot-service.enable.desc: Enable the snapshot service for a volume.
command.evs.snapshot.batch-rollback.desc: Roll multiple volumes back to snapshots.
command.evs.snapshot.create-volume.descr: Create a volume from a snapshot.
command.evs.snapshot.delete.description: Delete one or more volume snapshots.
command.evs.snapshot.rollback.descriptio: Roll a volume back to a snapshot.
command.evs.storage-type.list.descriptio: List volume storage types available for creation.
command.evs.volume.attach.description: Attach a volume to an instance.
command.evs.volume.delete.description: Delete or unsubscribe from a volume.
command.evs.volume.detach.description: Detach a volume from an instance.
command.evs.volume.list-by-name.descript: List volumes by region and volume name.
command.evs.volume.set-snapshot-delete-p: Set a volume's snapshot deletion policy.
command.evs.volume.show-by-name.descript: Retrieve volume details by region and volume name.
command.evs.volume.show.description: Retrieve volume details by volume ID.
command.evs.volume.update-iops.descripti: Update provisioned IOPS for an XSSD volume.
name: Elastic Volume Service
parameter.evs.image.create-from-volume.d: Private-image description containing 1-128 characters, with no newline or leading or trailing whitespace.
parameter.evs.image.create-from-volume.i: Private-image name containing 2-32 letters, digits, or hyphens; it cannot start with a digit or hyphen or end with a hyphen.
parameter.evs.image.create-from-volume.l: JSON array of labels to assign to the resource.
parameter.evs.image.create-from-volume.r: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.associate-: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.create.is_: Whether the automatic snapshot policy is enabled; default is true.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.create.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.create.ret: Automatic snapshot retention in days: -1 for permanent retention or 1-65535 days.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.create.sna: Automatic snapshot policy name containing 2-63 letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens and starting with a letter.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.delete.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.disassocia: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.list.regio: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.set-status: Region ID used to scope the request.
Target automatic snapshot policy status: activated or nonactivated.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.update.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.update.ret: Updated automatic snapshot retention in days: -1 for permanent retention or 1-65535 days.
parameter.evs.snapshot-policy.update.sna: Updated automatic snapshot policy name containing 2-63 letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens and not starting with punctuation or a digit.
parameter.evs.snapshot-service.enable.cl: Unique client token used for idempotency and for accurately checking whether snapshot-service activation succeeded.
parameter.evs.snapshot-service.enable.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.batch-rollback.az: Availability zone name; required in a multi-AZ region.
parameter.evs.snapshot.batch-rollback.re: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.batch-rollback.sn: Comma-separated snapshot IDs; all must exist, and at most eight may be rolled back together.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create-volume.cli: Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create-volume.cyc: Billing cycle count; required when on-demand billing is false, with a maximum of five years or 60 months.
Billing cycle type: year or month; required when on-demand billing is false.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create-volume.dis: Volume access mode; only VBD is supported.
Volume name containing 2-64 letters, digits, dots, underscores, or hyphens and not starting with punctuation.
Data-volume capacity in GB; supported ranges depend on the storage type and XSSD tier.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create-volume.mul: Whether the volume supports multiple instance attachments; default is false.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create-volume.on_: Whether the volume uses on-demand billing; default is true.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create-volume.reg: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create.client_tok: Unique client token used for idempotency when snapshot creation goes through the order workflow.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create.retention_: Snapshot retention policy: custom or forever.
Custom retention period from 1 to 65535 days; required for the custom policy and automatically 65535 for forever.
parameter.evs.snapshot.create.snapshot_n: Snapshot name containing 2-63 letters, digits, underscores, or hyphens and starting with a letter or digit.
parameter.evs.snapshot.delete.refund_ord: Whether to delete every snapshot for the volume and cancel the snapshot order; default is false.
parameter.evs.snapshot.delete.region.des: Region ID used to scope the request.
Maximum token-paginated snapshots; default is 10 and maximum is 1000 when nextToken is supplied.
parameter.evs.snapshot.list.next_token.d: Continuation token returned by the previous request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.list.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.list.retention_po: Snapshot retention-policy filter: forever or custom.
parameter.evs.snapshot.list.snapshot_sta: Snapshot status filter: available, freezing, creating, deleting, rollbacking, cloning, or error.
parameter.evs.snapshot.list.snapshot_typ: Snapshot creation-type filter: manu or timer.
Volume attribute filter: data or system.
Availability zone name used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.rollback.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.snapshot.usage.region.desc: Region ID used to scope the request.
Availability zone name; omit it to return storage types from every availability zone.
parameter.evs.storage-type.list.disk_typ: Comma-separated volume types: SATA, SAS, SSD, FAST-SSD, X-Entry, or XSSD-0 through XSSD-3.
parameter.evs.storage-type.list.region.d: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.attach.delete_disk_: Whether the volume is released with its instance; default is false and supported only for on-demand, non-shared volumes.
parameter.evs.volume.attach.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.create.az_name.desc: Availability zone name; required in a multi-AZ region and unnecessary in a single-AZ region.
parameter.evs.volume.create.backup_id.de: Available volume backup ID used as the source. The new VBD volume must be at least as large as the source and inherits its encryption setting.
parameter.evs.volume.create.client_token: Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.
Billing cycle count; required when on-demand billing is false, with a maximum of five years or 60 months.
parameter.evs.volume.create.cycle_type.d: Billing cycle type: year or month; required when on-demand billing is false.
parameter.evs.volume.create.delete_disk_: Whether the volume is released with its instance; default is false and available only for unattached or attached on-demand, non-shared volumes.
parameter.evs.volume.create.delete_snap_: Whether all snapshots are deleted with the volume; default is false and is supported only in East China 1 and North China 2.
parameter.evs.volume.create.disk_mode.de: Volume access mode: VBD, ISCSI, or FCSAN.
parameter.evs.volume.create.disk_name.de: Volume name containing 2-64 letters, digits, dots, underscores, or hyphens; it cannot start with punctuation.
parameter.evs.volume.create.disk_size.de: Data-volume capacity in GB: 10-32768 for SATA, SAS, SSD, and FAST-SSD; XSSD tier minima vary from 10 to 1024 GB and support up to 65536 GB.
parameter.evs.volume.create.disk_type.de: Volume type: SATA, SAS, SSD, FAST-SSD, or XSSD-0 through XSSD-3. SAS alone supports FCSAN; FAST-SSD and XSSD do not support ISCSI, and XSSD does not support encryption.
parameter.evs.volume.create.image_id.des: Private or shared data-volume image ID. The new volume must be in the source region and at least as large; batch creation, encryption, ISCSI, and FCSAN are unsupported.
parameter.evs.volume.create.is_encrypt.d: Whether the volume is encrypted; default is false. Shared, ISCSI, FAST-SSD, and XSSD volumes cannot be encrypted.
parameter.evs.volume.create.kms_uuid.des: KMS key UUID for an encrypted volume; an empty value uses the default key.
parameter.evs.volume.create.labels.descr: JSON array of labels to assign to the resource.
parameter.evs.volume.create.multi_attach: Whether the volume supports multiple instance attachments; default is false.
parameter.evs.volume.create.on_demand.de: Whether the volume uses on-demand billing; default is true.
parameter.evs.volume.create.provisioned_: Additional provisioned IOPS for an XSSD volume, starting at 0; the upper bound depends on the XSSD tier and capacity.
parameter.evs.volume.create.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.delete.client_token: Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.
parameter.evs.volume.delete.delete_snap_: Whether snapshots are deleted with the volume; must be true in regions that support snapshots and must be omitted elsewhere.
parameter.evs.volume.delete.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.detach.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.list-by-name.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.list.az_name.descri: Availability zone name used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.list.delete_disk_wi: Whether the volume is released with its attached instance.
parameter.evs.volume.list.disk_mode.desc: Volume access-mode filter: VBD, ISCSI, or FCSAN.
parameter.evs.volume.list.disk_status.de: Volume status filter: in-use, available, diskAttaching, detaching, creating, expired, or freezing.
parameter.evs.volume.list.disk_type.desc: Volume type filter: SATA, SAS, SSD, FAST-SSD, or XSSD-0 through XSSD-3.
parameter.evs.volume.list.max_results.de: Maximum token-paginated results; default is 10 and maximum is 1000. Using it disables page number and page size.
parameter.evs.volume.list.multi_attach.d: Whether the volume supports attachment to multiple instances.
parameter.evs.volume.list.next_token.des: Continuation token for token pagination. Using it disables page number and page size.
parameter.evs.volume.list.page_no.descri: Page number; default is 1 and ignored when token pagination is selected.
parameter.evs.volume.list.page_size.desc: Results per page; default is 10, maximum is 300, and the value is ignored when token pagination is selected.
Text matched against volume and attached-instance identifiers or names.
parameter.evs.volume.list.query_keys.des: Comma-separated fuzzy-search fields: name, diskID, instanceID, or instanceName; effective only with query content.
parameter.evs.volume.list.region.descrip: Region ID used to scope the request.
Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.
parameter.evs.volume.renew.cycle_count.d: Renewal cycle count, up to three years or 36 months.
parameter.evs.volume.renew.cycle_type.de: Renewal cycle type: year or month.
parameter.evs.volume.renew.region.descri: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.resize.client_token: Unique client token used to make order requests idempotent.
parameter.evs.volume.resize.disk_size.de: Target volume capacity in GB. Capacity can grow only; supported data-volume and system-volume ranges depend on the storage type.
parameter.evs.volume.resize.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.set-snapshot-delete: Set whether snapshots are deleted with the volume.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.show-by-name.region: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.show.region.descrip: Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.update-iops.provisi: Additional provisioned IOPS for an XSSD volume, starting at 0; the upper bound depends on the XSSD tier and capacity.
Region ID used to scope the request.
parameter.evs.volume.update.delete_disk_: Whether the volume is released with its attached instance.
parameter.evs.volume.update.delete_snap_: Whether all snapshots are deleted with the volume; default is false.
parameter.evs.volume.update.region.descr: Region ID used to scope the request.
